description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house with a flat roof featuring solar panels and a rooftop terrace. The exterior is predominantly dark with large windows and clean, geometric lines, surrounded by a manicured lawn and landscaped greenery. The property is enclosed by a low wall and includes a driveway leading to a garage, as well as a backyard with a swimming pool and outdoor seating area. The landscaping incorporates trees and shrubs, providing privacy and aesthetic appeal. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back to create a terrace space. The overall design emphasizes minimalism, functionality, and integration with outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, solar panels, large windows, landscaped yard, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the rear of the house with the backyard, terrace, and garden area visible.
description_view_1: View 1 displays the side elevation, highlighting the pool, outdoor seating, and the boundary wall along the street.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the front facade with the main entryway, driveway, and street access.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the opposite side, focusing on the garage, side yard, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple, flush door with a paved driveway, minimal steps, and no porch or overhang, emphasizing clean lines and modern aesthetics.
